notes: Built from successful motion-gate runs on 2026-02-28.
These are conservative profiles; they do not claim full repeatability qualification.

frozen_unloaded_baseline_20260303_154209.notes: IMMUTABLE frozen unloaded baseline for pre-gearbox validation.

gearbox_output_functional_20260304.notes: Gearbox-mounted functional profile for ODESC v4.2 new motor; validated 8/8 on ±1..±8 deg gearbox_output with authority_precheck off.

gearbox_output_precision_experimental_20.notes: Experimental tighter profile (tolerance 0.018 turns motor) for gearbox-mounted ODESC v4.2 new motor. Observed ~7/8 typical on ±2..±8 deg validation.

loaded_100g_r50_gravityfit_20260305.notes: 100g@50mm lever load compensation fit (directional gravity bias).

loaded_motion_200g_r75_retuned_20260306.notes: Load-specific 200g@75mm anchored profile. 24/24 pass, 0 wrong-direction, 0 timeout-like errors on full confirmation batch.

loaded_motion_300g_r75_precision_retuned.notes: 300g @ 75mm precision retune. Promoted from 8/8 fastpass + 8/8 fresh reconfirm. Long 16-24 move confirmations hit USB read stalls; treat as comms issue, not motion fault.

loaded_motion_gate_stable.notes: Gearbox remounted; confirmed bidirectional loaded motion gate with longer settle profile.

loaded_motion_rag_winner_current.notes: Validated with timeout-cap patch: 47/48 on 48-move endurance, zero wrong-direction.

last_result.notes: Validated 8/8 with move_to_angle gate off, absolute wrap, and per-call zero_turns_motor re-zeroing.

loaded_move_to_angle_gateoff_rezero_tune.notes: Micro-angle loaded profile validated on 2026-03-01 for +/-1 and +/-2 deg in gearbox_output with motor.direction=-1.

loaded_move_to_angle_gateoff_safe_202603.notes: Best-so-far runtime profile from Codex live tests on 2026-03-01 when using move_to_angle with pre_move_gate_mode="off". Safety guardrails in code now fail fast on divergence/frame drift. Not fully stable yet across repeated cycles.

last_result.note: Added after guarded damping tuning pass; use with adaptive_breakaway gate + hybrid mode.

loaded_move_to_angle_guarded_damped_exp_.notes: Experimental guarded profile from Codex live runs on 2026-03-01: higher damping, bounded pre-gate authority, divergence-abort safety. Not yet validated stable for bidirectional move_to_angle under current hardware behavior.

loaded_move_to_angle_micro_i1_20260301.notes: Micro-angle loaded profile validated on 2026-03-01 for +/-1 and +/-2 deg in gearbox_output with motor.direction=-1.

last_result.notes: Validated relative_to_current with robust hold tolerance: 20/20 at tol=0.014 turns motor (timeout=12s, settle=0.16s).

loaded_move_to_angle_relative_reliable_2.notes: Relative-mode reliable loaded profile (tol=0.014 turns motor, ~0.202 deg output @25:1).

last_result.notes: Promoted from tuned gateoff profile for relative-to-current operation.

loaded_move_to_angle_relative_reliable_4.notes: Promoted after live soak 40/40 pass on 2026-03-02 with sequence-level recovery available (not needed in pass run).

loaded_move_to_angle_slow_i1.notes: Low-speed loaded move_to_angle profile from i1 sweep (2026-03-01).

last_result.note: Created for controlled torque authority experiments. Use strict pre_move_gate and monitor for aborted_current/divergence.

loaded_move_to_angle_torque_authority_ex.notes: Experimental torque-authority profile: higher available current with direction-aware authority scales. Not validated as stable under current mechanical/electrical behavior (2026-03-01).

unloaded_micro_step_optimizer_20260303.notes: Auto-generated by micro-step optimizer (unloaded), targets 6/8 deg motor-space, no pre-move gate.

unloaded_motion_gate_stable.notes: No-load baseline with index-gating disabled for motion validation after board/config resets.

unloaded_move_to_angle_mid_dircomp_20260.notes: Unloaded directional-compensated profile from automated diagnostics on 2026-03-03. Plus direction requires higher authority than minus.
Auto-selected via validate_move_to_angle_sequence motor-space no-load sweep on 2026-03-03.

gearbox_output_position_step_working_202.notes: Current best angle-move regime for transferred metal-pin gearbox on known-good board. Calibrates with FULL_CALIBRATION_SEQUENCE and tracks ±0.06..±0.10 motor-turn steps with no wrong-direction or aborts. Velocity mode remains weak and is not recommended.

gearbox_output_move_to_angle_directional.notes: Current best high-level angle-command profile for transferred metal-pin gearbox on known-good board. Requires FULL_CALIBRATION_SEQUENCE bring-up and use_index=False runtime path. Directional positive-side authority bias eliminates prior +1/+2 degree stalls.

gearbox_output_continuous_quiet_20260309.notes: Continuous single-target mounted move profile. No intermediate waypoint settle. Validated quiet on single +15 deg continuous move and user-reported quiet long continuous moves at -300 deg and +300 deg. Use one final settle only; do not segment through intermediate settled waypoints. Not yet validated for large cross-zero reversal histories.
limitations: not yet validated for large cross-zero reversal histories

gearbox_output_continuous_aggressive_202.notes: Continuous single-target mounted move profile with aggressive travel limits. User-validated as quiet/drama-free in continuous mode. Use only for single final-target moves; do not segment through intermediate settled waypoints or zero-crossing ladders.
limitations: not yet validated for large isolated cross-zero reversal from fresh anchor

gearbox_output_continuous_precision_hold.notes: Quiet travel baseline with reanchor disabled and a longer bounded final-hold integrator window. Use this as the last software test for fixed static undershoot before treating the current gearbox mechanics as the blocker.
limitations: stop immediately if buzz or wrong-direction motion appears

gearbox_output_continuous_aggressive_hol.notes: Aggressive travel baseline with reanchor disabled and a longer bounded final-hold integrator window. Use this only after the quiet long-hold integrator profile, to test whether the same modest improvement survives at aggressive travel limits.
limitations: stop immediately if buzz or wrong-direction motion appears
aggressive travel limits can mask small settle improvements with extra launch/brake energy
